name: key.generate
brief: Generate a new Ed25519/Curve25519 keypair, store in keyring, return fingerprint

name: key.import
brief: Import armored public or private key into keyring

name: key.export
brief: Export key from keyring as armored text (secret flag exports private key)

name: key.list
brief: List all keys in the keyring

name: key.delete
brief: Delete a key from the keyring by fingerprint

name: encrypt
brief: Encrypt text for one or more recipients (fingerprint or armored pubkey)

name: encrypt.file
brief: Encrypt a file to an output file for one or more recipients

name: decrypt
brief: Decrypt an armored message with optional passphrase override

name: decrypt.file
brief: Decrypt an armored file to an output file

name: sign
brief: Sign text with a key (inline or detached)

name: sign.file
brief: Sign a file to an output file (inline or detached)

name: verify
brief: Verify a signed message (inline or detached with second arg)

name: verify.file
brief: Verify a signed file (inline or detached with second arg)

name: sym.encrypt
brief: Symmetrically encrypt text with a passphrase

name: sym.decrypt
brief: Symmetrically decrypt an armored message with a passphrase

name: armor
brief: Convert base64 binary to ASCII armor

name: dearmor
brief: Convert ASCII armor to base64 binary

name: gpg.detect
brief: Detect system gpg installation, return {installed, path, version}

name: gpg.exec
brief: Execute raw gpg command with args string or list

name: gpg.encrypt
brief: Encrypt text using system gpg for a recipient

name: gpg.encrypt.file
brief: Encrypt a file using system gpg for a recipient

name: gpg.decrypt
brief: Decrypt an armored message using system gpg

name: gpg.decrypt.file
brief: Decrypt a file using system gpg

name: gpg.sign
brief: Sign text using system gpg (inline or detached)

name: gpg.sign.file
brief: Sign a file using system gpg (inline or detached)

name: gpg.verify
brief: Verify a signature using system gpg (inline or detached)

name: gpg.verify.file
brief: Verify a signature file using system gpg

name: gpg.key.list
brief: List keys in system gpg keyring

name: gpg.key.import
brief: Import armored key into system gpg keyring

name: gpg.key.export
brief: Export key from system gpg keyring as armored text
